body.title: CC walk: Igor fixes BlissIntegrator IgorBase inheritance
body.result: Walk complete. Igor ran pe_chain autonomously (pre-flight pass, HYPOTHESIZE, scope_guard all working). Two pe_chain bugs found and fixed: (1) hallucinated HIGH-inertia drops instead of blocks (already fixed earlier), (2) pe_close_loop falsely closed ticket when implement_skipped=True. BlissIntegrator change implemented by CC after pe_chain failed HYPOTHESIZE validation. Commit fe818ed9.
body.description:
Target: T-bliss-integrator-igorbase. CC scaffolds Igor through this ticket.

Checklist:
1. Verify T-bliss-integrator-igorbase is pending + no stale proposal
2. Raise priority so Igor picks it up: set priority=0.95
3. Watch Igor claim it (PROC_QUEUE_DRAIN or manual adopt)
4. At PLAN step: verify proposal touches only bliss_integrator.py — no brainstem/
5. If false HIGH-inertia fires: reset, inject context via cc_send
6. Watch pre-flight — if exit:1 twice, diagnose failing test
7. Verify commit touches only bliss_integrator.py
8. Verify T-bliss-integrator-igorbase status=done
9. Close this ticket

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/bliss_integrator.py
**Design rules:** none apply to the walk ticket itself
**Scope boundary:** IN — scaffold Igor through T-bliss-integrator-igorbase. OUT — implementing the ticket directly unless Igor fails 3x.
**Test plan:** T-bliss-integrator-igorbase reaches done with Igor as primary author.
